name: the drafter falls uncovered clauses back to prose-judge (Layer D), never dropping them
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/draft-custom-rule.sh" --rule-id g-x --tool semgrep --prose 'The deployment topology must isolate tenants across availability zones.' --json > d.json 2>/dev/null; node -e 'const d=require(process.cwd()+"/d.json");if(d.clauses_fallback<1)process.exit(1);if(!d.coverage_report.some(c=>c.status==="fallback"&&c.binding.tool==="prose-judge.sh"))process.exit(1)' && echo layer-d-fallback 1>&2
